sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50029" key="i(erografiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερο-γρᾰφικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, γράμματα</foreign> <sense id="n50029.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sacred</tr_> signs, Man.Hist.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.512M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
